title: Classification
description: Classification schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Cloud DSPM API

description.description: Detailed description of what the classification detects.

sensitivityLevel.description: Default sensitivity level for data matching this classification.

isBuiltIn.description: Whether this is a built-in or custom classification.

regulatoryFrameworks.description: Regulatory frameworks referencing this data classification.

dataStoreCount.description: Number of data stores where matching data has been found.

dataAssetCount.description: Number of data assets matching this classification.
